Chinese Rights Cases, Once Near Resolution, Now Languish
articles.abstract: Several high-profile human rights cases remain in limbo in Chinese courts even as Pres Bush has first meeting with Pres Jiang Zemin at Asian economic summit meeting in Shanghai; cases of Yang Zili, Liu Yaping and Fong Fuming noted (S)
articles.snippet: Several high-profile human rights cases remain in limbo in Chinese courts even as Pres Bush has first meeting with Pres Jiang Zemin at Asian economic summit meeting in Shanghai; cases of Yang Zili, Liu Yaping and Fong Fuming noted (S)

articles.title: War on Terror Influences Australian Election
articles.abstract: Australia, first US ally to offer military support for global coalition against terrorism, will also be first to pass judgment on strategy thruogh ballot box; national election is being held as Australian troops prepare for action in Afghanistan under American command; polls show 80 percent approval for Prime Min John Howard's pledge and opposition Labor party is having problems getting voter attention for modest reforms it proposes for health, education and taxation programs (M)
articles.snippet: Australia, first US ally to offer military support for global coalition against terrorism, will also be first to pass judgment on strategy thruogh ballot box; national election is being held as Australian troops prepare for action in Afghanistan under American command; polls show 80 percent approval for Prime Min John Howard's pledge and opposition Labor party is having problems getting voter attention for modest reforms it proposes for health, education and taxation programs (M)
